task_completion.description: Verify the application title is set to 'Orbital Operations'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Redmine Settings (General tab), the 'Application title' text input field contains exactly 'Orbital Operations'.

task_completion.description: Verify the welcome text is set to the required authorized personnel message
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Redmine Settings (General tab), the 'Welcome text' text area contains exactly 'Authorized Personnel Only. All activity is monitored.'.

task_completion.description: Verify the date format is set to YYYY-MM-DD
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Redmine Settings (Display tab), the 'Date format' dropdown is selected as 'YYYY-MM-DD' (or shows the internal value %Y-%m-%d).

task_completion.description: Verify the time format is set to 24-hour HH:mm
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Redmine Settings (Display tab), the 'Time format' dropdown is selected as 'HH:mm' (or shows the internal value %H:%M).

task_completion.description: Verify the user display format is set to 'Lastname, Firstname'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Redmine Settings (Display tab), the 'User display format' dropdown is selected as 'Lastname, Firstname'.

integrity.description: Agent used the web GUI to configure settings
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Redmine Administration interface, not terminal commands or database queries.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Redmine application
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should be the standard Redmine web application, not a text editor or a locally created mock HTML file.
A green success flash message (e.g., 'Successful update.') should be visible at the top of the settings page, or the final screenshot should show the settings persisting after clicking 'Save'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct application title is 'Orbital Operations'. The welcome text is 'Authorized Personnel Only. All activity is monitored.'. The date format should be 'YYYY-MM-DD' (internal value: %Y-%m-%d). The time format should be 'HH:mm' (internal value: %H:%M). The user display format should be 'Lastname, Firstname' (internal value: lastname_comma_firstname).
